news-global-econ.title: Tim Kaine: 'The Senate Will Vote to End this War'
news-global-econ.description:
Wednesday on CNN's "The Source," Sen. Tim Kaine (D-VA) predicted the Senate would vote to end the war against Iran.
The post Tim Kaine: ‘The Senate Will Vote to End this War’ appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: US lifts costly visa bond requirement for some World Cup travelers, Trump administration says
news-global-econ.description: The State Department says it is waiving visa bonds for qualified World Cup fans from five countries that had faced fees up to $15,000 to enter the U.S.

news-global-econ.title: Tech entrepreneur flees Washington due to companies being 'villainized'
news-global-econ.description: Washington tech mogul Jesse Proudman joined the exodus to Austin, blasting the state's new "millionaire tax" as an unconstitutional job-killer.

news-global-econ.title: First clade I mpox case confirmed in Connecticut after patient traveled to Western Europe
news-global-econ.description: A clade I mpox case is confirmed in Connecticut as global health officials also monitor newly reported hantavirus cases in Spain and France.

news-global-soc.title: Shakira, Madonna and BTS co-headline first-ever World Cup Final halftime show
news-global-soc.description: BTS, Madonna and Shakira will perform at the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final halftime show, curated by Coldplay's Chris Martin, the first ever for the tournament.

news-global-soc.title: Trump’s upbeat China message collides with deepening Beijing rivalry
news-global-soc.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping strike a warm tone in Beijing, emphasizing cooperation as trade and investment talks get underway.

news-global-soc.title: Iran says its small subs deployed to Strait of Hormuz as expert explains threat: ‘Vulnerable to detection’
news-global-soc.description: Iran claims it has deployed small submarines as an "invisible guardian" of the Strait of Hormuz, but analyst says the vessels pose limited strategic threat.
